name: Quick Quiche
recipeIngredient: 8 oz shredded cheese (Swiss, cheddar, or Monterey Jack)
1 1/2 cups assorted vegetables (e.g., onion, green pepper, red pepper, mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crust from bread slices.
2. Place the bread slices into a quiche pan (an 11-inch clay baker works well).
3. In a bowl, combine all eggs and 4 oz of shredded cheese. Add half of the vegetables.
4. Whisk everything together until well mixed.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
6. Sprinkle the remaining cheese and the other half of the vegetables on top.
7. Bake for 25 minutes at 375°F.
This recipe is quick, simple, and delicious, earning compliments from those amazed by how easy it is.
